name: South Coast Ilwu
description_short: South Coast ILWU Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution in North Bend, OR offering auto loans, CDs, debit cards, and home banking services.
description_long:
South Coast ILWU Federal Credit Union operates as a traditional credit union serving members in the North Bend, Oregon area. Based on their website, the institution is affiliated with ILWU (International Longshore and Warehouse Union) members and the broader community. The credit union has been established long enough to maintain a scholarship fund for community members, indicating roots in local community investment.

The credit union offers a range of consumer banking products including auto loans, certificates of deposit (CDs), checking and savings accounts, debit cards, and home banking access. They currently promote competitive auto loan rates at 3.85% APR for up to 72 months on new or used vehicles, and advertise CD special rates. Members can enroll in online home banking for real-time account access and set up Visa purchase alerts via text or email to monitor spending.

As a credit union rather than a traditional bank, South Coast ILWU operates on a member-ownership model, which typically means more personalized service and rates designed to benefit members rather than external shareholders. They maintain a physical branch location and staff during regular business hours (Monday-Friday, with extended Thursday hours until 5pm). The institution provides dedicated support for lost or stolen cards and checks with direct phone lines.

This is a small, regional credit union appropriate for individuals seeking basic banking services with a community focus. However, the limited information on their website about loan products, account features, and fees means prospective members should contact them directly for detailed product comparisons. Credit union membership may require eligibility based on ILWU affiliation or geographic location. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Certificates of Deposit (CDs) with promotional rates
Debit cards with Visa purchase alerts
Lost or stolen card replacement services
Scholarship fund for members and community
pros: Competitive auto loan rates advertised at 3.85% APR for up to 72 months
Offers online home banking with real-time account access and enrollment available
Visa purchase alert feature allows text or email notifications for card transactions
Member-owned credit union structure typically benefits members with better rates than traditional banks
Maintains active scholarship fund demonstrating community investment
Extended Thursday hours until 5pm accommodates working members
Direct phone support for lost or stolen debit cards, credit cards, and checks
cons: Single physical branch location in North Bend, OR limits accessibility for non-local members
Limited online information about savings account rates, CD terms, or fee structures
Unclear membership eligibility requirements (ILWU affiliation may be required)
No mention of mobile app or mobile banking capabilities on website
Inconsistent office hours listed on website (two different sets of hours shown)
best_for: ILWU members or eligible individuals in the North Bend, Oregon area seeking auto financing
Local residents wanting personalized banking service from a member-owned institution
People interested in credit union membership with community investment focus
diagnosis: South Coast ILWU Federal Credit Union is best for individuals in or near North Bend, Oregon who are eligible for membership and seek basic banking services with competitive auto loan rates and a community-focused credit union experience. The main caveat is that membership eligibility may be restricted based on ILWU affiliation or geographic location, and the limited online information requires direct contact to understand all products and fees.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
